name: Implementing the HIPAA Security Rule
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST SP 800-66 Rev 2 (2024) provides implementation guidance for the HIPAA Security Rule — translates the regulatory requirements into actionable security practices for healthcare covered entities and business associates.
relationToCloudSecurity: Direct HIPAA implementation guidance; widely used by healthcare cloud customers.
relationToAISecurity: Healthcare AI systems handling PHI must satisfy HIPAA Security Rule per 800-66 patterns.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).
